props.label: At a Glance · From the Tape Desk

bullets.text: The barrel split in two. Crude prices the reopening — Brent at $71.94 with the first contango of 2026 and OPEC+ adding 188,000 bpd for August — while diesel and jet cracks near $40 price a Russian refining system hit 194 times this year. Russia, an oil-products exporter for a century, is importing gasoline from India.

July 2 was the macro pivot: payrolls rose just +57K, September hike odds fell toward a coin flip, and the tape rotated from the war trade to the labor market. The yen recovered to ~161 off its four-decade low; the Ministry of Finance's own data shows disclosed intervention still at zero.

US cash markets were shut Friday for the holiday observance, so the chip complex has had no fresh read since the SOX closed -5.44% on Thursday's AI-valuation scare. Monday reopens the tape with the OPEC+ addition and the weekend's yen levels the first things it must price.

props.caption: Crude prices the peace; products price the damage

props.title: The Tape
props.kicker: 2-3 Jul closes · US shut 3 Jul · weekend

items.why: The desk calls p=0.55 that ICE front-month Brent settles under $70.00 by Friday; the OPEC+ August addition and the contango argue down, the soft dollar argues against.
The open call moves to p=0.25 after soft payrolls pulled USD/JPY to ~161.2 with disclosed intervention still zero; crowded shorts keep the tail alive.

items.what: Taiwan · does the patrol repeat again
items.why: Beijing's east-of-Taiwan presence has run 34 days through one crew rotation; the desk prices another officially acknowledged patrol at p=0.75, and a boarding attempt remains the rung to watch.

items.what: The Cup · does anyone price the pause
items.why: No rights-holder has published break-specific ad rates; the desk calls p=0.20 that one does before the final. The opacity is itself the market structure.
South Korea's president attends the NATO summit as France's Le Pen appeal ruling lands on 7 July; watch whether the communiqué ties European security to the First Island Chain.

props.meta: Calibrated calls · 2026-07-05 · Foreman, Graves, Sprockett, Tinkerton

open_calls.question: USD/JPY reaches 162.50 (a retest of its 40-year low)
open_calls.detail: The posterior falls from 0.40: soft June payrolls repriced the Fed path, USD/JPY backed off to ~161.2, and MOF data shows disclosed intervention still zero while Tokyo keeps its US-coordination language. The tail stays open because shorts remain crowded and the rate gap is intact.

open_calls.question: ICE front-month Brent settles below $70.00
open_calls.detail: The first contango of 2026 and OPEC+'s 188,000 bpd August addition lean down with four sessions to run. The dissent reads the payrolls-driven soft dollar as a cushion and expects the weekend headline to fade by Tuesday.

open_calls.question: China acknowledges another east-of-Taiwan coast-guard patrol
open_calls.detail: One month of continuous patrols and a formal crew rotation read as institutionalization: the desk expects Beijing's channels to acknowledge continued operations within the week. The dissent notes acknowledgment cadence is Beijing's choice, and silence costs it nothing.

open_calls.question: A rights-holder publicly discloses break-specific World Cup ad rates before the final
open_calls.detail: Every dollar figure in circulation is a trade estimate; no rate card, sales memo, or on-record pricing exists in public. The desk expects the opacity to hold through the final — pricing the pause would concede that the pause is priced.

items.what: Spot gold at $4,174 booked its first weekly gain in five as the payrolls miss cut September hike odds toward a coin flip.

Tanker transits reached 242 in the week to 28 June against 700-plus prewar, and Iran holds its strait fees waived through a 60-day negotiation window while insisting on the authority to impose them later.

Quantum Systems closed a $1.2 billion round at roughly $8 billion to build its manufacturer-agnostic autonomy software layer, the week's clearest bet that the integrator above the platform is the prize.
